response.global_analysis: 1. Song Identification: Successfully identified two songs performed in this video. The first is 'Kirari' by Fujii Kaze (00:00 - 01:18) and the second is 'Theater' by Ayumu Imazu (01:34 - 04:47). 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON only contained lyrics for 'Theater'. The lyrics for the first song, 'Kirari', and the ending conversation were manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were adjusted dynamically to perfectly align with the vocal delivery of the singers. For 'Theater', transitions were formatted with millisecond precision to capture the rapid song pacing.

subtitles.original: やっと分かって本当に良かった
subtitles.english: I'm so glad I finally understand.

subtitles.original: 新しい日々は探さずとも
subtitles.english: Even if I don't look for new days,

subtitles.original: 常にここにある ここにある ここに ここに
subtitles.english: they are always right here, right here, right here.

subtitles.original: 色々見てきたけれど
subtitles.english: I've seen so many different things,

subtitles.original: この瞳は永遠に他にはない 永遠にきらり
subtitles.english: but these eyes are eternally like no other, eternally sparkling.

subtitles.original: 生きてこれたけど
subtitles.english: I managed to live on, but...

subtitles.original: 全ては夢みたい
subtitles.english: everything feels like a dream.

subtitles.original: あれもこれも
subtitles.english: This and that,

subtitles.original: 魅力的なのに
subtitles.english: everything is so charming,

subtitles.original: 私は君がいい
subtitles.english: but I only want you.

subtitles.original: どこにいってたの
subtitles.english: Where had you gone?

subtitles.original: 探してたよ
subtitles.english: I was looking for you.

subtitles.original: 連れてって 連れてって
subtitles.english: Take me away, take me away,

subtitles.original: 何もかも 捨てていくよ
subtitles.english: I'll leave everything behind.

subtitles.original: どこまでも どこまでも
subtitles.english: No matter how far, no matter how far.

subtitles.original: 荒れ狂う季節の中も
subtitles.english: Even in the midst of raging seasons,

subtitles.original: 群衆の中も
subtitles.english: and in the middle of crowds,

subtitles.original: 君とならば さらり さらり
subtitles.english: if I'm with you, it's so effortless.

subtitles.original: 新しい日々も
subtitles.english: Even the new days,

subtitles.original: 拙い過去も
subtitles.english: and my awkward past,

subtitles.original: 全てがきらり
subtitles.english: everything shines so brightly.

subtitles.original: SUPERNOVA
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: SUPERNOVA]

subtitles.original: welcome to our シアター ほら
subtitles.english: Welcome to our theater, come on,

subtitles.original: 踊れば幕開けの合図が it's calling you back
subtitles.english: if you dance, the signal of the curtain rising is calling you back.

subtitles.original: 月火から水木にお疲れ everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: Good job from Mon-Tue to Wed-Thu, everybody clap your hands.

subtitles.original: 待ち侘びた金土日さ come and bring all your friends
subtitles.english: It's the long-awaited Fri-Sat-Sun, come and bring all your friends.

subtitles.original: 世間はwork work 目線はdon't stop
subtitles.english: The world is work work, our eyes don't stop.

subtitles.original: 心も体もボロボロです
subtitles.english: Both mind and body are completely worn out.

subtitles.original: 頑張り屋な日本人に everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: To the hardworking Japanese, everybody clap your hands.

subtitles.original: やるせない朝にうんざりしちゃって
subtitles.english: I've got so sick of those depressing mornings.

subtitles.original: 何もしないroutine 染み込んだ癖 mistake
subtitles.english: Doing nothing routine, a deep-seated habit, mistake.

subtitles.original: また自分のせいに
subtitles.english: Blaming myself again.

subtitles.original: 憧れ持った能天気保存
subtitles.english: With carefree longings,

subtitles.original: 結局はいつも通りだ
subtitles.english: in the end, it's just like always.

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去っていくday by day
subtitles.english: Passing by, day by day,

subtitles.original: 考えたってdon't know if it's the right way
subtitles.english: even if I think about it, don't know if it's the right way.

subtitles.original: 吹く風も味方にして保存
subtitles.english: Making even the blowing wind our ally,

subtitles.original: let's ride away
subtitles.english: let's ride away.

subtitles.original: welcome to ourシアター
subtitles.english: Welcome to our theater.

subtitles.original: ほら踊れば幕開けの合図が it's calling you back
subtitles.english: Look, if we dance, the signal of the curtain rising is calling you back.

subtitles.original: 波瀾万丈な人生くらいがちょうどいいのさ
subtitles.english: A life full of ups and downs is just about right.

subtitles.original: 君が創るショータイムを見せて見せてちょうだい保存
subtitles.english: Show me, show me the showtime that you create!

subtitles.original: 春夏すぎ秋冬にやれやれ everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: Spring and summer pass, autumn and winter, oh dear, everybody clap your hands.

subtitles.original: ギリギリ駆け込んで間に合うかの never ending game
subtitles.english: Rushing in at the last second to see if we'll make it, a never ending game.

subtitles.original: 気持ちはgo go されどもno no
subtitles.english: My heart says go go, but yet it's no no.

subtitles.original: 現実はそう甘くないね
subtitles.english: Reality is not that sweet, is it?

subtitles.original: 働き屋な日本人に everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: To the hardworking Japanese, everybody clap your hands.

subtitles.original: お決まりのsuit and tie how can i be myself and i
subtitles.english: The usual suit and tie, how can I be myself and I?

subtitles.original: どれもこれも色のない世界には興味ない
subtitles.english: I have no interest in any of this colorless world.

subtitles.original: 見る向こう側で
subtitles.english: On the other side of what we see,

subtitles.original: we're gonna find a way
subtitles.english: we're gonna find a way.

subtitles.english: Welcome to our theater.

subtitles.english: Look, if we dance, the signal of the curtain rising is calling you back.

subtitles.english: Passing by, day by day,

subtitles.english: even if I think about it, don't know if it's the right way.

subtitles.english: Look, if we dance, the signal of the curtain rising is calling you back.

subtitles.original: とびっきりショータイム 誰でも招待
subtitles.english: An extraordinary showtime, inviting everyone!

subtitles.english: Please show me your showtime!

subtitles.original: あ、あの、星街すいせいちゃんのチャンネルですよね？
subtitles.english: Ah, um, you're Hoshimachi Suisei-chan's channel, right?

subtitles.original: ご存知かしら？ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Do you know of her? Thank you!

subtitles.original: え、あの、なんか、超偶然だったけど...
subtitles.english: Eh, um, like, it was a total coincidence but...
